title: S4a: migrator + advisor-protocol migrated end-to-end (coverage report, stub + anchor map, hook learns the bundle)
action: Per D20/D24/D29/D33/D35/D37. (1) Write scripts/okf_migrate.mjs (bee-repo tooling, NOT shipped, D24): given a source BA spec, it supports emitting a machine-readable anchor inventory (every numbered B*/R* anchor + Edge Cases/Pointers bullets) and a coverage check mode `--check <area>` that asserts set-equality: every source anchor recorded in the area's pointer-stub anchor map resolves to an existing concept under docs/knowledge/areas/<area>/ that claims it in bee.sources, each anchor owned by EXACTLY ONE concept (no loss, no duplication). The authoring itself is agent work, not script magic — the script inventories and verifies; you author the concepts. (2) Migrate docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md (202 lines, 9-section BA template) into docs/knowledge/areas/advisor-protocol/ as bee.area concepts: overview.md (Purpose+Entry Points+Data Dictionary+Actors), triggers.md (B1, B3 — dispatcher offer + orchestrator consult trigger), consult-loop.md (B2, B4 — worker consult + advice-is-advice, budget R7), slots-and-tiers.md (config authority R1-R3, transports, staleness R4-R6) — exact boundaries at your discretion (Agent's Discretion clause) but EVERY anchor must land in exactly one concept incl. all R-rules, Edge Cases bullets, and Pointers bullets distributed to the concept each governs. Frontmatter per D19/D32/D33: canonical emitter form (knowledge.mjs ROOT_KEY_ORDER/BEE_KEY_ORDER; run check after authoring — zero warnings required), bee.id unique, area concept ids per D31 (one concept per subject via bee.authoritative_for; directory holds several bee.area concepts), carry-over per D33 (area->bee.areas, decisions->bee.decisions, sources->bee.sources, updated->timestamp; coverage dropped). (3) Replace docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md with a pointer stub (D37): one-paragraph pointer to docs/knowledge/areas/advisor-protocol/ PLUS the full anchor map table (B1->concept path, R1->..., every anchor). Update the advisor-protocol row in docs/specs/reading-map.md to point at the bundle. Grep the repo for citations of advisor-protocol.md sections (B*/R* references outside docs/history) and rewire any live ones (skills/, scripts/, hooks/, .bee/bin/) — docs/history stays untouched (archive). (4) hooks/bee-session-close.mjs maybeCaptureNudge: widen newestSpec mtime scan to include docs/knowledge/**/*.md so the nudge does not fire forever once knowledge moves (D34); mirror to any projection the guards require (test_lib_mirror hook projections). (5) Add the coverage check to the chain: EXTRA_SUITES entry ["scripts/okf_migrate.mjs","--check","advisor-protocol"] + MANDATORY_SUITES pin (additive). (6) Run bee knowledge index (regenerates indexes incl. the new area level), log.md dated entry. (7) run_verify full chain green (64 suites). RED-FIRST where honest: the coverage --check must be shown failing against an incomplete draft (one anchor deliberately unassigned) before the final pass — that red run is the red_failure_evidence.

truths: node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 (64 suites incl. okf_migrate --check advisor-protocol)
coverage: every B*/R*/edge/pointer anchor of the source lands in exactly one concept — the --check output enumerates counts (N anchors, N owned, 0 dup, 0 lost) and is quoted in the trace
red evidence: --check shown red on a deliberately incomplete draft before the final green
bee knowledge check --json: zero OKF errors AND zero profile warnings after migration
bee knowledge index --check green (indexes regenerated and committed)
the stub keeps the docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md path alive with the full anchor map; inject.mjs spec count unaffected
session-close nudge scans docs/knowledge/ mtimes too
prohibitions: never delete docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md (stub replaces content, path stays — D20)
docs/history/** citations are NOT rewired (archive stays)
no invented content: every concept sentence traces to the source spec or is marked Open Gap (D10)

trace.outcome: advisor-protocol migrated end-to-end: 4 bee.area concepts + pointer stub with 26-anchor map, okf_migrate coverage gate in chain (64 suites), session-close nudge scans docs/knowledge/
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "verify_command": "node scripts/run_verify.mjs",
  "verify_tail": "PASS run_verify: 64 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=57270ms — incl. 'PASS scripts/okf_migrate.mjs --check advisor-protocol', 'PASS .bee/bin/bee.mjs knowledge check', 'PASS .bee/bin/bee.mjs knowledge index --check', 'PASS scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs' (64 suites discovered, floor 50, 26 mandatory incl. scripts/okf_migrate.mjs), 'PASS scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs' (runtime-derived hook inventory byte-identical, 10 files), 'PASS scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check' (434 files), 'PASS scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check'",
  "red_failure_evidence": "RED-FIRST coverage gate: concepts authored with the P7 claim deliberately omitted (write_concepts.mjs --omit P7), stub anchor map complete. 'node scripts/okf_migrate.mjs --check advisor-protocol' printed verbatim: 'FAIL okf_migrate --check advisor-protocol: 26 anchors, 25 owned, 0 duplicated, 1 lost' + '  - LOST in concepts: P7 is claimed by no concept's bee.sources (expected one owner)', exit=1. After completing the mapping: 'PASS okf_migrate --check advisor-protocol: 26 anchors, 26 owned, 0 duplicated, 0 lost — every source anchor lands in exactly one concept and the stub map agrees (D35/D37)', exit=0",
  "coverage_counts": "26 anchors total (B1-B4, R1-R9, E1-E6 edge bullets, P1-P7 pointer bullets, matching 'okf_migrate --inventory' run against the pre-migration 202-line source: behaviors 4, rules 9, edges 6, pointers 7, total 26); 26 owned, 0 duplicated, 0 lost; frozen registry in scripts/okf_migrate.mjs is the no-loss baseline surviving the source becoming a stub",
  "knowledge_check": "bee knowledge check --json post-migration: okf.errors=[], profile.warnings=[], counts {files:6, concepts:4, errors:0, warnings:0} — zero OKF errors AND zero profile warnings (canonical emitter frontmatter, no not_canonical)",
  "index_check": "bee knowledge index rendered 3 generated index file(s) (root, areas/, areas/advisor-protocol/); 'knowledge index --check: 3 expected index file(s), 0 stale — OK'",
  "stub_and_consumers": "docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md path kept alive as pointer stub with the full 26-row anchor map (D20/D37); inject.mjs counts docs/specs/*.md by filename only so the spec count is unaffected; reading-map.md advisor row rewired to the bundle; no other live B*/R* citation of advisor-protocol.md exists outside docs/history (grep evidence: only reading-map.md:32 was live)",
  "hook_evidence": "hooks/bee-session-close.mjs maybeCaptureNudge now takes max mtime over docs/specs/*.md (flat, historical shape) AND docs/knowledge/**/*.md (recursive walk, D34); mirrored byte-identically to .bee/bin/hooks/ (test_lib_mirror runtime hook inventory green); release manifest rewritten (--write, 434 files) and --check green"
}
